full_text:
Zhang Xiao (Zuwen) 張斅 (祖文)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Xiao (張斅), styledZuwen (祖文). Argued that arrests of suspected traitors were too lenient. Zhang Xiao was affiliated with the Jin Dynasty.
